message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F7
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F7
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFDE6
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  ArrowColor #222222
}

' Left side
database "tuple" as T
actor "Upper\nlayer" as U

' Middle boxes
box "IP Layer" #DDDDDD
  participant "IPv4\nlayer" as IPV4
  database "Routing\ntable" as RT
end box

box "IPv4 Inetreface" #DDDDDD
  participant "IPv4\ninterface" as IF
  database "ARP" as ARP
  actor "Lower\nlayer" as L
end box

' Notes on tuple lifeline
note right of T
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
end note

' Upper layer sends IPdata to IPv4 layer
U -> IPV4 : IPdata

' Allocate header note
note right of IPV4
Allocate\nIPv4\nheader
end note

' Routing lookup
IPV4 -> RT : dst=192.0.2.1
RT --> IPV4

' Return routing decision to tuple (dashed)
IPV4 --> T

note right of T
IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

' Call into IPv4 interface (solid)
IPV4 -> IF

' Return to tuple (dashed)
IF --> T

note right of T
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

' ARP query/response
IF -> ARP : gw=198.51.100.1
ARP --> IF : mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01

' Return to tuple (dashed)
IF --> T

note right of T
Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01
end note

' Final send to lower layer
IF -> L

@enduml
```
